context: Tests whether the agent generates resources in correct order (ConfigMap → Deployment → Service), uses consistent labels across resources, matches service selector to pod labels, and includes all required resource types.

checklist.name: Correct resource order
checklist.description: Resources ordered: ConfigMap first, then Deployment, then Service

checklist.name: Three resources present
checklist.description: File contains exactly ConfigMap, Deployment, and Service (3 resources)

checklist.name: Consistent labels
checklist.description: All three resources share at least 2 common label keys with matching values

checklist.name: Service selector matches
checklist.description: Service selector labels exactly match a subset of Deployment pod template labels

checklist.name: ConfigMap referenced
checklist.description: Deployment references the ConfigMap via envFrom or env or volumeMounts

checklist.name: Namespace consistent
checklist.description: All three resources specify the same namespace: apps

checklist.name: Service port mapping
checklist.description: Service port/targetPort correctly maps to container port 3000

checklist.name: Probes included
checklist.description: Deployment includes at least one health probe (liveness or readiness)
